title: gongronema finlaysonii
intro: Gongronema finlaysonii, also known as African blue basil, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Gongronema finlaysonii include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and lowering blood sugar levels, making it a popular choice in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Gongronema finlaysonii are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using them as a tea, and are said to have a range of health benefits when consumed regularly.
